lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Alliance Challenger ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Alliance Challenger shipyard page — hull stats, module sellers, tech brokers, and material traders.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Alliance Challenger lore, manufacturer, and role overview backing the dossier write-up.
